title: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) Earnings Dates & Report | Seeking Alpha
text: Seeking Alpha provides comprehensive earnings coverage and analysis for BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI). The company's most recent earnings announcement on May 5, 2026 showed mixed results with revenue missing analyst expectations but gross margins exceeding projections. Revenue came in at $34.4 million versus the expected $35.28 million, representing a miss. However, gross margins of 34% significantly exceeded historical averages, driven by Ask Sage's higher-margin generative AI products. The company's backlog increased 14% to $281.9 million, providing strong revenue visibility for future quarters. Analyst ratings on Seeking Alpha reflect cautious optimism with a consensus rating of Hold and average price target of $5.33. Key catalysts for BBAI include: execution on backlog conversion, Ask Sage integration success, additional contract wins from the $900 million Air Force contract vehicle, and progress toward profitability. Risks include continued losses, cash burn, securities litigation, and execution challenges. The platform provides detailed earnings transcripts, financial analysis, and real-time commentary from professional and retail investors.
